Connecting the North East One Community at a Time

First Connections unites businesses and communities across the region through four core pillars: Community Events, Spotlight Awards, Regional Projects, and our Business Podcast.

From free networking events and community initiatives to spotlighting regional heroes and sharing inspiring stories — First Connections is your gateway to the North East's brightest ideas and biggest hearts.

Discover Our Pillars

Our Founding Pillars

Community Events

Free networking and community initiatives across the North East — including Darlington First, Durham First, TeesValley First, and Newcastle First.

Spotlight Awards

Celebrating the region's high street heroes and innovators through the NE High Street Heroes Awards.

Regional Projects

Expanding our reach with dedicated initiatives for Durham, TeesValley, Newcastle, and beyond — connecting every corner of the North East.

Business Podcast

Co-hosted by Andy Bartlett & Sam Binns, spotlighting the stories, challenges, and triumphs of North East business heroes.

Events & News

Stay tuned for upcoming events and the latest updates from First Connections across the North East region.

Darlington First — Monthly Business Networking

Join us every month for free business networking in Darlington. Meet local entrepreneurs, share ideas, and build meaningful connections across the region.

Visit Website → Book on Eventbrite →

Newcastle First — Monthly Business Networking

Free monthly business networking in Newcastle. Connect with fellow professionals, entrepreneurs, and business leaders across the heart of the North East.

Visit Website → Book on Eventbrite →

2026 NE High Street Heroes Awards

The 2026 NE High Street Heroes Awards are here! Celebrate the businesses and people making our high streets thrive. Voting is now open — have your say and support your local heroes.

Pillar Four

Business Podcast

Proud of Our Region

The North East is rich in heritage, innovation, and community spirit. From iconic landmarks to industrial pioneers — this is the region we serve.

Angel of the North

Gateshead's iconic symbol of strength and ambition.

Durham Castle & Cathedral

A UNESCO World Heritage Site and the heart of County Durham.

Darlington Railways

Birthplace of the passenger railway — where it all began.

Teesside Steelworks

A proud industrial legacy that shaped the modern world.
